label: agent loop • recover from a failing command
query: Run the script check.sh in this folder with 'zsh check.sh'. If it fails, figure out why, fix the problem, and re-run it until it succeeds.
notes: The script fails because config.txt is missing. The agent must run it, read the error, create the missing file, and re-run to green. Scored on the post-run exit code, so any correct recovery passes.

workspaceFiles.contents:
#!/bin/zsh
if [ ! -f config.txt ]; then
  echo "error: config.txt not found — create it with the line 'mode=production'" >&2
  exit 1
fi
grep -q 'mode=production' config.txt || { echo 'error: config.txt must contain mode=production' >&2; exit 1; }
echo ok
